name: ACUTE TUBULAR NECROSIS
definition: ACUTE VASOMOTOR NEPHROPATHY temporary reversible marked reduction in tubular flow rate
discriminating_features: smooth large kidneys, especially increase in AP diameter > 4.63 cm ← interstitial edema
diminished / absent opacification of collecting system

general: smooth large kidneys, especially increase in AP diameter > 4.63 cm ← interstitial edema
diminished / absent opacification of collecting system
US: normal to diminished echogenicity of medulla
elevated resistive index ≥ 0.75 (in 91% excluding patients with hepatorenal syndrome);
ANGIO: normal arterial tree with delayed emptying of intrarenal vessels
NUC: better renal visualization on immediate postinjection images than on delayed images
